历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14174 → 15045 → 20043 → 19881 → 17853, showing a V-shaped trend of first declining and then rising; in 2023, the ranking significantly dropped to 20043 (affected by factors such as the provincial control line decrease that year), and in 2024–2025 it rebounded for two consecutive years, with the 2025 baseline around 17853, moving forward by about 2190 places over the past two years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 40 in 2021 → 42 in 2022 → 43 in 2023 → 49 in 2024 → 50 in 2025, with continuous small-scale expansion; the 2026 plan is 57 students, an increase of 7 students (+14%) compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, which has a certain dilution effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking from 2021 48th → 2022 58th → 2023 59th → 2024 61st → 2025 54th → 2026 56th, stable in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; from 2021 to 2026, no significant negative or positive public opinion signals appeared in the reputation documents; in the Douyin popularity overall ranking, it did not enter the top 106, with average exposure; no record of enrollment gaps in the abnormal enrollment files, indicating a stable psychological environment for applicants; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data lacks entries for this university; its traditional strengths are geology, geological resources and geological engineering and other geoscience disciplines, directly corresponding to majors such as Geology and Geophysics in the enrollment plan.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other fields continue to be highly popular (2024), and the university's related majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation) benefit from industry trends; the number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing was 98954 in 2021 → 112556 in 2022 → 120872 in 2023 → 132325 in 2024 → 139478 in 2025, with continuous growth; in 2026, the total number of examinees is 209000, estimated at about 135850 for Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 65%, a slight decrease from 2025; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch was 446 in 2021 → 411 in 2022 → 406 in 2023 → 427 in 2024 → 425 in 2025, stable around 425 in recent years; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, which is in the central-western region like Chongqing, with no obvious regional preference; un.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 17853, the dilution effect of a 14% expansion in 2026, the high and stable number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing, the stable 211 level and reputation of the university, and the continued heating up of popular majors such as computer science and electronic information, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 19553, with a range of 19053–20053.

With a 14% expansion in 2026, the overall admission opportunity has increased compared to 2025.
